arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Fulham – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal face Fulham in the Premier League this evening aiming to close the gap on leaders Liverpool. The Gunners can move within nine points of Liverpool with a win at the Emirates, after entering the international break following a 1-0 win over Chelsea. Mikel Arteta’s side will want to build momentum ahead of a huge […] The post Arsenal vs Fulham – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Man Utd face biggest test as Saka makes timely Arsenal return
arts.sum: How Leicester supporters would love a season of disappointment like the one Manchester City are 'enduring' - a FA Cup semi-final at Wembley to look forward to with Pep Guardiola's side still well placed to secure Champions League football next term. Alexander-Arnold suffered a high ankle sprain in the club's Champions League loss to Paris Saint-Germain before the international break that will see him miss the visit of Everton, and with his back-up Conor Bradley also likely to be absent with a hamstring issue, Slot must decide who starts on the right-hand side of the defence as the Reds look to take another step closer to the title.

arts.ttl: 'I played with Mikel Arteta and saw the qualities he's shown to transform Arsenal'
arts.sum: Former Arsenal defender Philippe Senderos played with the Gunners' current boss Mikel Arteta at Everton and believes the clues to his managerial quality were visible even then

arts.ttl: Arsenal guaranteed to be without four players vs Fulham as Bukayo Saka decision confirmed
arts.sum: And the preparation is to be better than Fulham and beat them tomorrow," the Arsenal boss said on Monday. Arsenal have nine games of the Premier League season remaining, as well as at least two Champions League matches against Real Madrid, and Mikel Arteta is keen to build some momentum ahead of the run-in.
Will Bukayo Saka feature from the jump after returning to full fitness over the international break?

arts.ttl: Ex-Arsenal star terminates contract after being diagnosed with rare brain condition
arts.sum: Former Arsenal youngster Kristoffer Olsson has left Danish club Midtjylland as he hopes to resume his career after battling back to fitness after a rare brain condition

arts.ttl: Do Arsenal have an Emile Smith Rowe buy back clause as Fulham star returns
arts.sum: Arsenal academy graduate Emile Smith Rowe will return to the Emirates Stadium for the first time this evening when his new club Fulham visit. In his final two seasons combined, Smith Rowe made less appearances than that 2021/22 campaign and eventually it was only a matter of time before the Gunners and the midfielder parted ways.

After a 16-day wait, we’re finally back in action again when Fulham cross the capital for a game under the Emirates Stadium lights on Tuesday (7.45pm UK), as the 2024/25 Premier League season enters its final straight. Rodrigo Muniz has scored five goals as a sub in the Premier League this season, the most by a Fulham player in a single campaign in the competition.
